messages.content: hey! sorry i kinda disappeared for a few days, life got busy lol
Hey, welcome back! No need to apologize at all - life happens! Hope the busy stretch wasn't too stressful. What's been going on? 😊
yeah i was out with some friends this weekend, met a few new people too, was a good time
That sounds really fun! There's something great about a weekend where you actually get out and meet new people. Did you click with anyone in particular, or was it more just a good group vibe overall?
theres this one person i hit it off with, we've been texting nonstop honestly. kinda excited about it

Ooh that's exciting! That nonstop texting phase where everything feels fresh and interesting is such a good feeling. Is this a potential romantic thing or more of a new friend situation? Either way it sounds like a good connection!
anyway i'll probably be around less now that im seeing them more. just wanted to let you know whats up
That's really sweet of you to check in! But honestly, go enjoy it - that sounds like exactly the kind of thing worth being present for. Hope it keeps going well with them! 😊
